summary: Regional banking company Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 46.7% year on year to $3.28 billion. Its GAAP profit of $0.83 per share was 1.2% below analysts’ consensus estimates.
